question: 1. Total number of employees.
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP;

question: 2. Total salary of all employees.
query: SELECT SUM(SAL) FROM EMP;

question: 3. Average salary of all employees.
query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(SAL), 2) FROM EMP;

question: 4. Highest salary in the company.
query: SELECT MAX(SAL) FROM EMP;

question: 5. Lowest salary in the company.
query: SELECT MIN(SAL) FROM EMP;

question: 6. Total departments in EMP table.
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DEPTNO) FROM EMP;

question: 7. Number of employees who are managers.
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT MGR) FROM EMP;

question: 8. Total commission paid.
query: SELECT SUM(COMM) FROM EMP;

question: 9. Average commission (ignoring NULLs).
query: SELECT AVG(COMM) FROM EMP;

question: 10. Number of employees getting commission.
query: SELECT COUNT(COMM) FROM EMP;

question: 11. Number of employees without commission.
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE COMM IS NULL;

question: 12. Count of distinct jobs.
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT JOB) FROM EMP;

question: 13. Highest commission earned.
query: SELECT MAX(COMM) FROM EMP;

question: 14. Difference between max and min salary.
query: SELECT MAX(SAL) - MIN(SAL) FROM EMP;

question: 15. Department-wise total salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 16. Department-wise average salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 17. Department-wise number of employees.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 18. Job-wise number of employees.
query: SELECT JOB, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 19. Job-wise total salary.
query: SELECT JOB, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 20. Job-wise maximum salary.
query: SELECT JOB, MAX(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 21. Job-wise minimum salary.
query: SELECT JOB, MIN(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 22. Department-wise maximum salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, MAX(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 23. Department-wise minimum salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, MIN(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 24. Department-wise average commission.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, AVG(COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 25. Department-wise job-wise number of employees.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB;

question: 26. Department-wise job-wise total salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB;

question: 27. Department-wise job-wise average salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB;

question: 28. Job-wise average commission.
query: SELECT JOB, AVG(COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 29. Dept-wise count where manager is NULL.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE MGR IS NULL GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 30. Dept-wise average commission excluding NULLs.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, AVG(COMM) FROM EMP WHERE COMM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 31. Job-wise total commission.
query: SELECT JOB, SUM(COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB;

question: 32. Dept-wise count of employees getting commission.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 33. Job-wise count of employees not getting commission.
query: SELECT JOB, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE COMM IS NULL GROUP BY JOB;

question: 34. Dept-wise employee count where job is 'SALESMAN'.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE JOB='SALESMAN' GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 35. Job-wise max salary where salary > 1500.
query: SELECT JOB, MAX(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE SAL > 1500 GROUP BY JOB;

question: 36. Dept-wise total salary excluding Dept 30.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO != 30 GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 37. Job-wise average salary where department is 20.
query: SELECT JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 20 GROUP BY JOB;

question: 38. Dept-wise number of employees where commission is NOT NULL.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE COMM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 39. Job-wise total salary for 'CLERK' and 'MANAGER'.
query: SELECT JOB, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE JOB IN ('CLERK','MANAGER') GROUP BY JOB;

question: 40. Dept-wise average salary for employees hired after 1981.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE HIREDATE > '31-DEC-81' GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 41. Job-wise employee count where salary > 2000.
query: SELECT JOB, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE SAL > 2000 GROUP BY JOB;

question: 42. Dept-wise total salary for Dept numbers > 10.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 10 GROUP BY DEPTNO;

question: 43. Dept-wise job-wise total commission.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB;

question: 44. Total salary for each year of hiring.
query: SELECT TO_CHAR(HIREDATE, 'YYYY') AS Year, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY TO_CHAR(HIREDATE, 'YYYY');

question: 45. Total employees hired in each month.
query: SELECT TO_CHAR(HIREDATE, 'MON') AS Month, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY TO_CHAR(HIREDATE, 'MON');

question: 46. Department where sum of salaries is maximum.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING SUM(SAL) = (SELECT MAX(SUM(SAL)) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO);

question: 47. Job having the minimum average salary.
query: SELECT JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING AVG(SAL) = (SELECT MIN(AVG(SAL)) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB);

question: 48. Department having highest employee count.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(COUNT(*)) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO);

question: 49. Departments having same number of employees.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING COUNT(*) IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO GROUP BY COUNT(*) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);

question: 50. Department having the minimum total salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING SUM(SAL) = (SELECT MIN(SUM(SAL)) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO);

question: 51. Job having the highest average salary.
query: SELECT JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING AVG(SAL) = (SELECT MAX(AVG(SAL)) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB);

question: 52. Dept number and total salary where avg > overall avg.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING AVG(SAL) > (SELECT AVG(SAL) FROM EMP);

question: 53. Jobs having more than one manager.
query: SELECT JOB, COUNT(DISTINCT MGR) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT MGR) > 1;

question: 54. Jobs having more than 2 employees.
query: SELECT JOB, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;

question: 55. Job-wise average salary where total salary > 5000.
query: SELECT JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING SUM(SAL) > 5000;

question: 56. Dept-wise total salary where employee count > 4.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING COUNT(*) > 4;

question: 57. Jobs whose minimum salary is less than 1000.
query: SELECT JOB, MIN(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB HAVING MIN(SAL) < 1000;

question: 58. Depts having max salary > 4000.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, MAX(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING MAX(SAL) > 4000;

question: 59. Depts having a total salary greater than 10000.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING SUM(SAL) > 10000;

question: 60. Dept and Job combination with lowest average salary.
query: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB HAVING AVG(SAL) = (SELECT MIN(AVG(SAL)) FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, AVG(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB));
